neqsim.chemicalreactions.chemicalequilibrium
 

  • Uses of PhaseDesmukhMather in neqsim.chemicalreactions.chemicalequilibrium

    Methods in neqsim.chemicalreactions.chemicalequilibrium with parameters of type PhaseDesmukhMather
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private double
    ChemicalEquilibrium.getDesmukhMatherMolalityActivityCoefficient(PhaseDesmukhMather phase, ComponentInterface component, double molality)
    Converts the Deshmukh-Mather stored mole-fraction activity coefficient back to the molality scale used by the original correlation.
    private double
    ChemicalEquilibrium.getLogDesmukhMatherReactionActivity(PhaseDesmukhMather phase, ComponentInterface component)
    Calculates the Deshmukh-Mather aqueous reaction activity on a molality basis.
